hero.subtitle: 20+ years building mission-critical systems. Now delivering at startup velocity.

aiEdge.title: Senior Expertise. Startup Speed.
aiEdge.card1Body: I deliver production-ready MVPs in days, not months. AI-augmented workflows cut waste — you get working software fast, built on solid architectural foundations from day one.
aiEdge.card2Body: I scale systems that millions rely on. 20+ years hardening architectures for Erste Group and BRZ — secure by design, built to last, and ready for whatever comes next.
aiEdge.card3Body: I bridge legacy and modern — without the big-bang rewrites that kill projects. I modernize incrementally, integrate AI workflows, and turn technical debt into competitive advantage.

ersteDigital.description: Lead frontend development on creditLab — Erste Group's corporate credit intelligence platform. React/TypeScript/Vite stack, API integration, Node.js backend for complex PDF generation, Jenkins CI/CD.

freelance.description: Consulting and development of tailored software solutions for companies across various industries.

brz.description: Development and maintenance of mission-critical applications for the Austrian federal administration.

banking.description: Development of financial applications with the highest demands on availability and compliance.

earlyCareer.description: Building the foundations in web development and full-stack technologies.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.metaDescription: Privacy policy of Kratky Tech KG pursuant to GDPR and TKG 2021.
datenschutz.intro: The protection of your personal data is of particular concern to us. We therefore process your data exclusively on the basis of legal provisions (GDPR, TKG 2021). In this privacy policy, we inform you about the most important aspects of data processing within our website.
datenschutz.visitTitle: Data Processing When Visiting the Website
datenschutz.visitText: When visiting our website, your IP address and the start and end of your session are recorded for the duration of the session. This is technically necessary and constitutes a legitimate interest within the meaning of Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR. This data is not further processed by us and is automatically deleted after the session ends.
datenschutz.contactText: If you contact us by email, your provided data will be stored for the purpose of processing the request and in case of follow-up questions for six months. We will not share this data without your consent.
datenschutz.analyticsText1: Our website uses Cloudflare Web Analytics. This is a privacy-friendly analytics solution that, unlike conventional tools, completely avoids the use of cookies. No cross-website tracking takes place (no "fingerprinting").
datenschutz.analyticsText2: Only aggregated, anonymised usage statistics are collected (e.g. which pages were visited or which browser type was used) to optimise the technical stability and performance of the site. No personal data or IP addresses are permanently stored.
datenschutz.hostingText: We host our website with Microsoft Azure (Microsoft Ireland Operations Ltd.). To provide the website, the host collects technically necessary log files. The processing is based on our legitimate interest in the technically sound and secure operation of our website in accordance with Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR.
datenschutz.rightsText: You generally have the rights of access, rectification, deletion, restriction, data portability, revocation and objection regarding your data stored with us. If you believe that the processing of your data violates data protection law or your data protection rights have otherwise been infringed, you can lodge a complaint with us (office@kratky.tech) or the data protection authority.
